prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次为3911→2811→2457→1889→1496，连续5年持续上升（位次数字逐年减小），累计提升约2415名，竞争逐年加剧；202 5年基准位次约1496名，近3年累计提升约961名，上升势头强劲；本省物理类招生计划2021年34人、2022年32人、2023年43人、2024年28人、2025年45人；2026 年计划30人，较2025年缩招约33.3%，缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争有所缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，哈工大（校本部）软科排名2026年第12位，较202 5年第14位上升2位，排名持续走高，对考生吸引力增强；哈工大2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音总排名第10位（高热），短视频曝光量大 ，国防七子品牌效应突出，报考关注度较高；2024年投档异常文件显示哈工大曾出现投档线波动信号，但整体声誉平稳；哈工大（校本部）第五轮学科评估A-及 以上共17个学科，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A等，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力 强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大（威海）核心招生专业大类社会热度持续偏高（2024年电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程高热推荐） ，工科专业整体报考热度不减；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（物理类207171+历史类90087=297258）略有增加，物理类估算约206310人，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升的强劲趋势、2026年软科排名上升、抖音高热关注度、 工科专业热度不减等竞争加剧因素，以及2026年招生计划大幅缩招33.3%的缓和因素，在2025年基准1496名基础上，缩招效应与热度上升效应相互对冲后，预计位次仍将小幅前移；预测最低位次约1217名，区间1078–1356名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 3911→2811→2457→1889→1496, showing a continuous upward trend for 5 consecutive years (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative increase of about 2415 places, and competition intensifying year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1496, with a cumulative increase of about 961 places in the last 3 years, showing a strong upward momentum; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 34 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30, a reduction of about 33.3% compared to 2025, a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; HIT (main campus) ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, up 2 places from 14th in 2025, with a continuously rising ranking, enhancing its appeal to candidates; HIT's 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; overall Douyin ranking 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, prominent brand effect of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense', and high application attention; the 2024 abnormal admission file shows that HIT once had fluctuations in admission cutoffs, but overall reputation is stable; HIT (main campus) has 17 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment major categories at HIT (Weihai), such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have consistently high social popularity (Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering highly recommended), and the overall application heat for engineering majors remains undiminished; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category 207,171 + History Category 90,087 = 297,258), with an estimated Physics Category of about 206,310, expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the strong upward trend of historical rankings, the rise in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, high Douyin attention, undiminished heat for engineering majors and other competition-intensifying factors, along with the mitigating factor of a significant 33.3% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, based on the 2025 baseline of 1496, after offsetting the reduction effect and the heat increase effect, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1217, with a range of 1078–1356.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Pilot Classes (Computer and Electronic Communication, Electrical and Automation) and Software Engineering as main targets, with Tier 1 AI Advanced Technology Leading Class and Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1078) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
